reviews.review_title: Surprising level of polish for a Go game
reviews.review_description: I picked this up as I was aware of the developer, having enjoyed Operation Warcade on my PSVR. I wasn't expecting too much but it's surprisingly addictive and has great graphics/presentation. Matrix-puns are everywhere but it's fun and lots of game here for the price. Gets hard quickly. Multiplayer seems to be offline though so get it for the single player.

...it costs $10.  Graphics are good and challenge is very high after the first few levels. I'm glad to see at least one developer still creates games for the Go, but this game is overpriced which may explain why this will be the first review to be posted, several days after the game first appeared on the Oculus Go webpage.
